title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
